remarks: Excellent opportunity to acquire an established, well known restaurant in the heart of Darien, CT. Rated as the best Thai restaurant in Darien on both Yelp and Google with over 100 reviews each. Thai Time has an elegant dining room with a separate bar area. Located in the Goodwives Stop & Shop shopping center, there is excellent visibility and more than ample parking available. Do not contact employees regarding the sale. Financials available after NDA is signed. New owner must meet the landlord's criteria for lease.
